message:
fix(cli): harden service install and tighten port-kill safety

- Escape systemd ExecStart args containing whitespace/special chars
- Escape XML metacharacters in launchd plist generation
- Validate bind address before writing service unit files
- Replace get_uid() -> current_uid() with proper error propagation
  instead of silently defaulting to UID 501
- Tighten select_killable_agent_mail_pids: only terminate processes
  with explicit Agent Mail signatures; HTTP health probe alone no
  longer authorizes termination of unsigned listeners
- Fix systemd_service_configured_port early-return to use continue
- Add tests for XML escaping, systemd quoting, and kill rejection

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
